commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Feishu plugin to infer bot mentions from orphaned reply placeholders, clear rootId for mentioned replies, and add parser regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. A Feishu group reply with parent_id/root_id, text containing the bot placeholder, and mentions that omit the bot still leaves mentionedBot=false on current main and is dropped by the requireMention gate.
commands.review_followup: Manual review and contributor action are needed because real behavior proof is missing, the branch conflicts with current Feishu parser/routing code, and the remaining fix requires a maintainer call on orphan-placeholder trust and thread semantics.

target.title: fix(feishu): detect bot mention in reply messages and prevent unwanted thread routing
target.author: lizhiqi0910
